arts.ttl: Photos: Real Madrid legend in attendance for Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid are currently in action at Anfield as they take on Liverpool in the league phase of the Champions League. Los Blancos are looking to make life a bit…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti breaks Sir Alex Ferguson Champions League record against Liverpool
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti is taking charge of his 215th Champions League match tonight, passing former Manchester United boss Sir Alex Ferguson

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand defends Mohamed Salah over contract stand-off with Liverpool and insists Egyptian star has NOT 'been disrespectful' to the Merseyside giants
arts.sum: The Egyptian's contract is set to expire at the end of this season and he recently claimed in a shock interview that there are no new offers to stay from Liverpool chiefs.

arts.ttl: Gareth Bale lifts lid on retirement after surprise return at Liverpool v Real Madrid
arts.sum: Bale, who scored a stunning winner for Real Madrid against Liverpool in the 2018 final, returned to Anfield as a pundit

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Liverpool-Real Madrid, Juventus-Aston Villa
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Liverpool host Real Madrid in a heavyweight clash and Aston Villa take on Juventus.

arts.ttl: Three problems Ancelotti needs to solve at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Spanish football expert Guillem Balague explains the three problems puzzling manager Carlo Ancelotti at Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes huge Trent Alexander-Arnold decision as Liverpool change made for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool team news from Anfield as Arne Slot picks his side for the visit of Real Madrid in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham rules out Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Bellingham on Liverpool deal and Premier League move Jude Bellingham has once again reiterated that he intends to stay at Real Madrid for the next 10 to 15 years.

arts.ttl: Liverpool flop reveals he is 'considering retirement' at 31 after failing to find a new club for the season
arts.sum: A former Liverpool star is considering hanging up his boots aged 31 after failing to find a new club. 'I don't think it would hit me that hard because I've already been going through this process,' he said.

arts.ttl: What Liverpool need to qualify for Champions League knockout stages as Real Madrid reality clear
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Arne Slot's team prepares to face Real Madrid in the Champions League
